case_title: LUIS VELEZ VS. BEST BUY COMPUTER, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VELEZ, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT BEST BUY COMPUTER, INC.
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO DEFENDANT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) NO APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
